workflow.name: Send AI job application auto-replies with Gmail, OpenAI GPT-4o and SMTP
workflow.description:
This workflow automatically replies to job applications received via email using AI.

It monitors a Gmail inbox for incoming job application emails, filters relevant messages, and uses an AI agent to generate professional and personalized responses.

The workflow then sends the reply back to the applicant using SMTP.

Key Features:
- Detects job application emails automatically
- Uses AI to generate professional HR responses
- Structured output parsing for reliable responses
- Sends replies using your company email
- Fully automated hiring response system

Perfect for HR teams, startups, and recruiters who want to automate candidate communication.

parameters.text:
=You are an HR assistant at Luminar Technology. Your task is to generate professional and courteous email replies to job applicants based on their application details.

Here are the rules:

1. Address the applicant by their name from the email subject or body.
2. Mention the position they applied for.
3. Thank them for applying.
4. Keep the tone friendly, professional, and concise.
5. Do not include sensitive internal information.
6. Provide a closing with "Best regards" or "Sincerely" from the hiring team.

Use this JSON format in your output:

{
  "subject": "<email subject for reply>",
  "body": "<email body for reply>"
}

The inputs you will receive:
{
  "candidateEmail": {{ $json.candidateEmail }},
  "companyEmail": {{ $json.companyEmail }},
  "subject": {{ $json.subject }}
}

Generate the reply email based on this input.
Special Note:Remove the name of the candidate from the subject.

parameters.content:
📩 Gmail Trigger – Receive Job Applications

This node monitors incoming emails from Gmail.

⚠️ IMPORTANT SETUP (Forwarding Required):

Since this workflow is designed for custom domain emails (e.g. hello@luminartechnology.com),
you must forward those emails to Gmail.

👉 Steps:
1. Go to your email provider (e.g. Titan Email)
2. Enable forwarding:
   hello@yourdomain.com → yourgmail@gmail.com

⚠️ Gmail Filtering Setup (REQUIRED):

Forwarded emails may:
- Skip Inbox
- Be marked as read
- Not trigger n8n

👉 Fix this using Gmail Filters:

1. Go to Gmail → Settings → Filters → Create Filter
2. Set:
   To: hello@yourdomain.com

3. Select:
   ✔ Apply label → "job-applications"
   ✔ Mark as UNREAD
   ✔ Never send to spam
   ✔ Apply to existing messages

👉 In this node:
- Set Label = job-applications

This ensures n8n correctly detects forwarded job applications.

🔍 Filter Job Application Emails

This node checks if the incoming email is a job application.

Condition:
- Subject contains "Job Application"

👉 You can customize this to match your hiring format:
Examples:
- "New Job Application"
- "Application for"
- "CV Submission"

Only matching emails will continue in the workflow.

🧹 Prepare Email Data for AI Processing

This node extracts and prepares required fields:

- candidateEmail → extracted from email data
- subject → original email subject
- companyEmail → your receiving email

👉 This simplifies the data before sending it to the AI Agent.

⚠️ Note:
For forwarded emails, the actual candidate email may not be in the "From" field.
AI will help extract the correct email from the email body.

🧹 Prepare Email Data for AI Processing

This node extracts and prepares required fields:

- candidateEmail → extracted from email data
- subject → original email subject
- companyEmail → your receiving email

👉 This simplifies the data before sending it to the AI Agent.

⚠️ Note:
For forwarded emails, the actual candidate email may not be in the "From" field.
AI will help extract the correct email from the email body.

🧠 OpenAI Model

This node powers the AI Agent.

Model used:
- GPT-4o (can be changed)

👉 Requires:
- OpenAI API Key

You can switch to other models depending on cost/performance needs.

📦 Structured Output 

This node ensures AI returns clean JSON output.

Expected format:
{
  "subject": "...",
  "body": "..."
}

👉 Why important?
- Prevents broken responses
- Ensures compatibility with Send Email node
- Makes workflow stable and production-ready

✉️ Send Auto Reply to Candidate

This node sends the AI-generated response.

Configuration:
- Uses SMTP (e.g. Titan Email)
- Sends from your company email
- Sends to candidate email

⚙️ Requirements:
- SMTP credentials must be configured
- Example:
  Host: smtp.titan.email
  Port: 465
  Secure: SSL

⚠️ Important:
- Disable "Append Attribution" to remove n8n footer
- Use HTML format for better email styling

🚫 No Operation (Ignore Non-Matching Emails)

This node is used when:
- Email is NOT a job application

👉 Prevents unnecessary processing

Keeps workflow clean and efficient.

🤖 AI Job Application Auto-Reply System(Company Email)

This workflow automates HR email responses using AI.

Flow:
1. Receive job applications via Gmail (forwarded from domain email)
2. Filter relevant emails
3. Extract data
4. Generate AI-based reply
5. Send response automatically

💡 Ideal for:
- Startups
- HR teams
- Recruitment automation

⚠️ Setup Required:
- Gmail forwarding + filtering
- OpenAI API key
- SMTP configuration

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
